icons.title: Deities
icons.description: Figure with halo arc for devas

icons.title: All
icons.description: sabba — ring with three inner dots

icons.title: Unwise attention
icons.description: Tangled lines for ayoniso, āsava, uddhaccakukkucca

icons.title: Wise attention
icons.description: Clear lines and horizon circle for yoniso

icons.title: Avoiding (fork)
icons.description: Parivajjanā — path to danger vs safety.

icons.title: Flame
icons.description: Flame representative of thought of sensual desire (kāmavitakka)

icons.title: Thorn vine
icons.description: Thorn vine representative of thought of ill will (byāpādavitakka)

icons.title: Heir of material things (bowl with excess)
Lunar fortnight (four phases)
icons.description: Four lunar phases — auspicious nights row

icons.title: Stained bronze bowl
icons.description: Stained bowl (neglected) — not seeing one’s blemish

icons.title: Polished bronze bowl
icons.description: Polished bowl (cared for) — knowing one’s blemish

icons.title: Unwholesome wish: concealing wrongdoing
icons.description: Eye with slash — wish for hiding faults

icons.title: Unwholesome wish: status
icons.description: Seat motif — desire for precedence and honor

icons.title: Unwholesome wish: to teach
icons.description: Speaking figure — wish to instruct others

icons.title: Unwholesome wish: honor
icons.description: Bow and second figure — wish to be revered

icons.title: Number badge (r=10)
icons.description: Template circle + digit for stepped lists

icons.title: Four postures
icons.description: Four postures: walk → stand → sit → lie

icons.title: Clear awareness — four sense domains
icons.description: 2×2 grid (eye, ear, body activity, cognizing) — sampajānakārī

icons.title: First jhāna simile
icons.description: Kneading bath with bubbles — jhāna band

icons.title: Cultivated: string on heartwood
icons.description: bhāvitā simile — light ball on solid wood

icons.title: Liberation sparkle
icons.description: Gold sparkle on path to liberation

icons.title: Tree simile: without branches and leaves
Tree simile: abundant branches and leaves
Two darts
icons.description: Figure with bodily dart and mental loop

icons.title: rubbing wood: friction and heat
icons.description: Rubbing two dry wood pieces produces flame-like heat. Simile for sustained contact (phassa) that produces feeling.

icons.title: separating wood: heat fades
icons.description: Separating two dry wood pieces extinguishes the flame-like heat. Simile for ceasing contact (phassa) that ceases feeling.

icons.title: Fine peg replaces coarse peg
icons.description: Two pegs and replacement arrow (aññaṁ nimittaṁ…)

icons.title: Strong person subdues a weaker one
Hindrance: dullness and drowsiness
icons.description: Thinamiddha motif — cloud and drooping line.

icons.title: Simile: debt (craving)
icons.description: Figure burdened with money sack — abhijjhā like iṇa

icons.title: Simile: free from debt (craving abandoned)
icons.description: Upright figure, coins scattered — abhijjhā pahāya

icons.title: Simile: disease (ill will)
icons.description: Aching figure with pain marks — byāpāda like roga

icons.title: Simile: regaining health (ill will abandoned)
icons.description: Strong figure and bowl — byāpāda pahāya

icons.title: Simile: prison (dullness and drowsiness)
icons.description: Figure behind bars — thīnamiddha like bandhanāgāra

icons.title: Simile: released from prison (dullness abandoned)
icons.description: Open gate and free figure — thīnamiddha pahāya

icons.title: Simile: slavery (restlessness and worry)
icons.description: Figure in shackles — uddhaccakukkucca like dāsabya

icons.title: Simile: dangerous wilderness path (doubt)
icons.description: Thorny track and wary traveler — vicikicchā like kantāraddhānamagga

icons.title: Simile: place of safety (doubt abandoned)
icons.description: Figure on sheltered ground — vicikicchā pahāya

icons.title: Pure conduct: body, speech, and mind
icons.description: Triangle of figure, speech bubble, and radiant mind — kāya · vacī · mano

icons.title: Simile: traveler among villages (past lives)
icons.description: Road, huts, and walking figure — pubbenivāsānussatiñāṇa

icons.title: Simile: seeing between two houses (divine eye)
Simile: clear mountain lake (ending of taints)
icons.description: Still water, visible bottom, observer — āsavakkhayañāṇa

icons.title: Emptiness of perceptions
icons.description: Hollow ring with dashed void — suññato

icons.title: Non-belonging
icons.description: Unconnected dot with dispersed lines — netaṁ mama

icons.title: Return loop (repeat often)
icons.description: U-shaped track with arrow — dwell thus often · tabbahulavihārī

icons.title: Bait: five cords of sensual pleasure
icons.description: Five radiating lines from a central dot — pañcannaṁ kāmaguṇānaṁ nivāpa

icons.title: Herd rushing in
icons.description: Vortex spiral — anupakhajja, herd consumed by infatuation

icons.title: Herd: barren tree
icons.description: Bare tree — extreme abstinence, strength failed

icons.title: Herd: visible lair
icons.description: Shelter glyph inside dashed net — āsayaṁ kappayiṁsu, found by stake-nets

icons.title: Herd: beyond reach
icons.description: Circle past dashed barrier with gold rays — yattha agati nevāpikassa

icons.title: Cessation of perception and feeling
icons.description: Hollow vessel with dashed lines — saññāvedayitanirodha, intact body with no inner activity
